description_long: This is a single-story bungalow situated on a large rectangular plot of green lawn, bordered by a paved driveway leading to an attached garage. The house features a cross-gabled roof with dark shingles and light-colored exterior walls, likely clad in siding. A covered front porch with supporting columns is visible, providing a welcoming entryway. Multiple windows of varying sizes are arranged asymmetrically across the facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The structure is set back from the street, with a wide driveway connecting to the main road. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a cross-gabled dark roof, light siding, attached garage, and a covered front porch, set on a spacious green lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, attached garage, and driveway leading to the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage extension, side windows, and the depth of the lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, rear windows, and the expansive backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side and rear of the house, with visible rooflines and additional windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
